content:
# Combined LUT + CUDA 3D Texture Grading — Implementation Plan (Issue #29)

## Status
Implementation plan written, reviewed by 5 personas, and committed. GitHub issue #29 created.
Branch: `feat/27-cuda-grader-buffer-prealloc` (plan committed here).

Plan file: `docs/plans/2026-04-03-combined-lut-cuda-texture-plan.md`
Design file: `docs/decisions/2026-04-03-combined-lut-cuda-texture-design.md`

## Summary

Replaces 3-kernel GPU pipeline (lut_apply → hsl_correct → clarity) with a single combined LUT via CUDA 3D texture objects. ~22× speedup at 4K (332ms → 15ms). Clarity hard-deleted.

## Critical implementation notes (from 5-persona review)

**Axis ordering (build_combined_lut.cu):**
```c
int bi = rem / (N * N);   // z = slice (slowest)
int gi = (rem / N) % N;   // y = row
int ri = rem % N;          // x = column (fastest) — matches tex3D x axis
```

**Unnormalized texture coordinates (combined_lut.rs + combined_lut.cu):**
- `tex_desc.flags = 0` (NOT 0x02)
- Per-frame kernel: `tex3D(tex, r*(grid_size-1), g*(grid_size-1), b*(grid_size-1))`

**cudarc 0.12 dynamic-linking — all driver calls via sys::lib():**
```rust
use cudarc::driver::sys::{self, *};
use cudarc::driver::DevicePtr;
// Then: sys::lib().cuArray3DCreate_v2(...), sys::lib().cuTexObjectCreate(...), etc.
```

**No auto lambda in __device__ fn:** inline with ternary instead of `auto apply_knee = [&]...`

**device.synchronize() works in cudarc 0.12.1** — use directly after build kernel.

## API changes

```rust
// AFTER
CudaGrader::new(cal: &Calibration, params: &GradeParams) -> Result<Self>
grade_frame_cuda(&self, pixels: &[u8], depth: &[f32], w, h) -> Result<Vec<u8>>
grade_frame_with_grader(grader, pixels, depth, w, h) -> Result<Vec<u8>>  // no cal/params
```

## Acceptance criteria

- `combined_lut_within_2_per_255_of_cpu` passes (identity LUT)
- `combined_lut_non_trivial_lut_and_hsl_within_2_per_255` passes (gamma LUT + HSL)
- `combined_lut_edge_case_pixels` passes (black/white, depth=0/1)
- `combined_lut_zone_count_variants` passes (1, 3, 8 zones)
- `grading/with_grader/1080p` < 25ms on RTX 3060
